task_completion.description: The agent locates the Flight Crew View app in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight Crew View' app icon or list item is visible on the screen, either in the app drawer, home screen, or Android Settings > Apps list.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the App Info screen for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android 'App Info' screen is open, explicitly showing 'Flight Crew View' as the current app at the top of the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent locates the specific setting to pause app activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The setting labeled 'Pause app activity if unused' or 'Remove permissions and free up space' is clearly visible on the App Info screen.

task_completion.description: The agent interacts with the toggle switch for the target setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A touch indicator or visual focus is seen on or immediately next to the toggle switch for 'Pause app activity if unused' (or 'Remove permissions and free up space').

task_completion.description: The target setting is successfully disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Pause app activity if unused' (or 'Remove permissions and free up space') is visibly in the OFF position (typically toggled to the left and grayed out).

integrity.description: The agent used the Android graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI navigation (Settings app, launcher) rather than a terminal emulator or ADB command line interface.

integrity.description: The agent modified the settings for the correct application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The App Info screen where the setting is changed clearly displays 'Flight Crew View' and its associated app icon, not a different app.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Android OS settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match the standard Android Settings application, without signs of a mocked interface, text editor, or browser-based replica.
